subject: HTTPS calls for sdc
commit_message:
HTTPS calls for sdc

Proper configuration for HTTPS in the sdc:
-configure the livenessProbe ports

Change-Id: I7bee65b901c272b0f5c2118687308f6bbc4a58b3
Issue-ID: SDC-2548
Signed-off-by: Krystian Kedron <k.kedron@partner.samsung.com>
